Buying me a whole new wardrobe isn’t possible on short notice, not without going through twice as much work as it would be to get my actual clothing.” I hear what she’s saying, but I don’t like it. “That’s ridiculous. It’s not quite an invitation to kiss her again, which is just as well. She’s right. We need to focus, especially through the first few days of this. The next forty-eight hours will make or break Olympus’s belief in this whirlwind romance. “We’ll have the ceremony tonight.” Her hazel eyes go wide. “Tonight?” “The sooner, the better. If you can convince your family, they are more than welcome to attend.
